name: Verify hc_pipeline.js taskName bug is patched
desc: Confirm the string-immutability TypeError (taskName.tags.push) in executeSingleTask is removed — patch applied 2026-03-19

name: Verify hc_auto_success.js express require path is corrected
desc: Confirm require('core/heady-server') is replaced with require('express') in registerAutoSuccessRoutes — patch applied 2026-03-19

name: Start heady-manager.js server process
desc: All 20 services are unhealthy (0/20). Root cause: heady-manager.js not running. Start server on port 3301 to enable all downstream services.

name: Create data/ directory for auto-success persistence
desc: Ensure data/ directory exists for auto-success-tasks.json, auto-success-audit.json, and trial-ledger.json persistence

name: Null-guard logger calls in hc_auto_success.js
desc: Lazy-loaded logger at line 45 of hc_auto_success.js can be null. All logger.logSystem() calls throw if logger is null. Add null guards.

name: Resolve heady-manager.js ESM/CJS mixed module syntax
desc: heady-manager.js mixes import and require() without package.json 'type:module'. This causes SyntaxError on startup. Either add type:module or convert to CJS.

name: Verify npm install resolves all pipeline dependencies
desc: js-yaml, express, js-yaml, EventEmitter and other deps required by hc_pipeline.js must be installed. Run npm install and verify node_modules/ exists.

name: Wire eventBus to auto-success engine before start()
desc: AutoSuccessEngine.start() checks global.eventBus. If not set before start(), all 50+ reaction triggers are silently unwired and engine runs deaf to system events.

name: Wire patternEngine, selfCritique, storyDriver to auto-success engine
desc: Engine.wire() must be called with all external systems for full feedback loop: patternEngine.observeSuccess/observeError, selfCritique.recordCritique, storyDriver.ingestSystemEvent

name: Set global.__vectorMemory before auto-success engine boot
desc: Bee workers write learnings to global.__vectorMemory. If not set, all bee reaction learning writes are silently skipped. Wire vector memory before engine.start().

name: Verify HCFullPipeline event-spine Redis connection
desc: Pipeline v8.0.0 uses Redis streams (heady:events, hcfp-consumers group) as event-spine with BLOCK 0 (instantaneous). Without Redis/Upstash connected, event-driven mode falls back.

name: Ensure pipeline.bind() called after heady-manager bootstrap
desc: HCFullPipeline.bind({ mcScheduler, patternEngine, selfCritique }) must be called from heady-manager.js after all systems are loaded for post-run feedback loops to work.

name: Validate all 21 pipeline stages load without circular deps
desc: Run topologicalSort on the 21-stage pipeline to confirm no circular dependencies. Stage order: channel-entry → recon → intake → classify → triage → decompose → trial-and-error → orchestrate → monte-carlo → arena → judge → approve → execute → verify → self-awareness → self-critique → mistake-analysis → optimization-ops → continuous-search → evolution → receipt

name: Verify Ed25519 receipt signing key exists at configs/pki/
desc: Stage 20 (receipt) requires Ed25519 signing key at configs/pki/ed25519-receipt-key.pem. If missing, receipt stage fails. Generate with: openssl genpkey -algorithm ed25519 -out configs/pki/ed25519-receipt-key.pem

name: Check configs/pki/ directory and generate missing PKI assets
desc: Pipeline receipt stage requires PKI directory. Verify configs/pki/ exists, create if missing, and generate Ed25519 key pair for trust receipt signing.

name: Verify heady-manager.js auto-success engine instantiation
desc: heady-manager.js must import AutoSuccessEngine from src/services/auto-success.js, instantiate it, call .wire() then .start(). Verify this boot sequence exists and is correct.

name: Test pipeline cold run via node -e require
desc: Run: node -e "const { pipeline } = require('./src/hc_pipeline.js'); pipeline.load(); console.log(pipeline.getConfigSummary())" to verify pipeline loads all configs correctly.

name: Verify .heady_cache/ directory writeable for task cache
desc: Pipeline task cache writes to .heady_cache/pipeline_task_cache.json. Directory must exist and be writable. mkdir -p .heady_cache

name: Confirm improvement lane cron schedule is active
desc: The improvement side lane must run every 15 minutes (*/15 * * * *) for continuous autonomous optimization. Verify cron/scheduler is configured or use node-cron in heady-manager.

name: Validate circuit breakers initialize from resource-policies.yaml
desc: HCFullPipeline.load() reads resource-policies.yaml circuitBreaker section. Verify monitoredEndpoints are defined and breakers for llm-provider and external-news-api are correctly initialized.

name: Verify heady-manager port 3301 not blocked by firewall or prior process
desc: Check lsof -ti:3301 before starting. If occupied, identify and stop the blocking process. Port 3301 is the canonical heady-manager MCP+API port.
